$comment: Reference schema for docnav config source examples that include Markdown native options and navigation-owned outline selectors. The schema describes JSON file shape only. Navigation input resolution owns source mapping, selector priority, path matching and threshold comparison; selected adapter declarations own option semantics such as max_heading_level type and range validation before request construction.

enabled.description: Default pagination state for document operations.

limit.description: Default positive Markdown character budget for paginated document operations.

output.description: Default core CLI output mode for document operations.

options.description: Raw adapter-owned native option source map. The current Markdown adapter declares max_heading_level for outline/find; navigation input resolution registers that declaration, then validates and extracts the typed 1..6 value.

outline.description: Navigation-owned outline selectors. Path rules run before adapter-scoped cost thresholds; runtime diagnostics own matcher compilation and source-scoped failure details.

path.description: Rust regex pattern matched against the complete slash-normalized document.path.
